pi_items.source: Counting the tests created in setup_task.sh (3 in test_parser.py, 5 in test_statistics.py, 3 in test_report.py). Confirmed via pytest --collect-only.
Analyzed export_result.sh which only checks 8 patterns. '.itervalues()' is neither present in the source code nor checked by the evaluation script.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated NOAA ISD style weather sample. The target project directory is /home/ga/PycharmProjects/weather_analysis. There are exactly 11 pytest test functions provided in the project, contradicting the metadata claim of 12. The evaluation script (export_result.sh) enforces 8 specific forbidden Python 2 patterns, contradicting the metadata claim which incorrectly includes '.itervalues()'. The passing score threshold is verified as 60.
